spell.name: Magic Missile
desc: Fires a magic missile that always hits its target and does
unresistable damage.
Sometimes a beam is fired instead that hurts each monster
in its path.
The chance to get a beam goes up with your character level.

spell.name: Light Room
desc: Lights up all squares within 2 grids of the player, and hurts
all light-sensitive monsters in the area of effect.
If you are in a room, the entire room will be lit up as well.

spell.name: Find Traps, Doors & Stairs
desc: Detects all traps, doors, and stairs in the immediate area.

spell.name: Phase Door
desc: Teleports you randomly up to 10 squares away.

spell.name: Electric Arc
desc: Creates an electrical discharge that hurts monsters and destroys
vulnerable items in its path.  Length of the effect increases
with player level.

spell.name: Detect Monsters
desc: Detects all non-invisible monsters in the immediate area,
for one turn only.

spell.name: Fire Ball
desc: Shoots a radius-2 fire ball.

spell.name: Recharging
desc: Adds charges to a stack of wands or staves.
Chance of success and number of charges gained increase with your
level and decrease with level of wand or staff and number of charges.
A failed attempt to recharge destroys one wand or staff from the stack.

spell.name: Identify Rune
desc: Reveals an unknown rune on an object.

spell.name: Treasure Detection
desc: Detects gold and senses objects in the immediate area.

spell.name: Frost Bolt
desc: Shoots a bolt of frost that always hits its target.
Sometimes a beam is fired instead that hurts each monster
in its path.
The chance to get a beam goes up with your character level.

spell.name: Reveal Monsters
desc: Detects all monsters in the immediate area, for one turn only.

spell.name: Acid Spray
desc: Sprays acid in a 60-degree cone, hitting all monsters up to 10 grids away.

spell.name: Disable Traps, Destroy Doors
desc: Disables traps and destroys doors within a 1-square radius of you.

spell.name: Teleport Self
desc: Teleports you randomly within the current level.

spell.name: Teleport Other
desc: Produces a bolt that teleports away the first monster in its path.
Distance teleported increases with player level.

spell.name: Resistance
desc: Grants you resistance to acid, cold, fire and lightning for 20+1d20 turns.

spell.name: Tap Magical Energy
desc: Turns wand or staff energy into mana; tapping stuns the player briefly.

spell.name: Mana Channel
desc: Increases spellcasting speed by 33% for 5+1d5 turns.

spell.name: Door Creation
desc: A door is created on each empty floor space that is directly
adjacent to you.  These doors are closed, but not locked.

spell.name: Mana Bolt
desc: Fires a magic missile that always hits its target and does
unresistable damage.
Sometimes a beam is fired instead that hurts each monster
in its path.
The chance to get a beam goes up with your character level.

spell.name: Teleport Level
desc: Teleports you 1 level up or 1 level down (chosen at random).
This spell may have no effect when the forced descent option is set.

spell.name: Detection
desc: Detects all traps, doors, stairs, treasure, objects and monsters in the
immediate area.

spell.name: Dimension Door
desc: Teleports you to (or near to) a square of your choice.

spell.name: Thrust Away
desc: Fires a short range beam of force.

spell.name: Shock Wave
desc: Shoots a radius-2 sound ball.
Apart from doing sound damage, this also has a chance to stun
each monster in the area of effect.

spell.name: Explosion
desc: Shoots a radius-2 shards ball and throws around anything in the area of
effect.

spell.name: Banishment
desc: Removes all monsters represented by a chosen symbol from the level.
Uniques are not affected.
You take 1d4 points of damage for every monster removed.

spell.name: Mass Banishment
desc: Removes all monsters within 20 squares of you.
Uniques are not affected.
You take 1d3 points of damage for every monster removed.

spell.name: Mana Storm
desc: Shoots a radius-3 mana ball that does unresistable
damage to each monster in its area of effect.

spell.name: Detect Life
desc: Detects all living monsters in the immediate area, for one turn only.

spell.name: Fox Form
desc: Changes you into the shape of a quick and stealthy fox.
While shapechanged you cannot use items.

spell.name: Remove Hunger
desc: Magically renders you comfortably fed (but not satiated).

spell.name: Stinking Cloud
desc: Shoots a radius-2 poison ball.

spell.name: Confuse Monster
desc: Confuse a single monster; more effective against animals.

spell.name: Slow Monster
desc: Slows down a monster; more effective against animals.

spell.name: Cure Poison
desc: Neutralizes poison.

spell.name: Resist Poison
desc: Grants you resistance to poison for 20+1d20 turns.

spell.name: Turn Stone to Mud
desc: Produces a beam that destroys the first section of wall it hits,
unless it is a permanent wall.  Each monster caught in the beam that
is susceptible to rock remover takes 20+1d30 points of damage.

spell.name: Sense Surroundings
desc: Maps the nearby area.

spell.name: Lightning Strike
desc: Strikes a target from above with a lightning bolt, followed by a clap
of thunder.  If targeting a direction or the target is not a passable
grid in the line of sight, the player will be the target.

spell.name: Earth Rising
desc: Causes shards to explode in a line out of the earth, striking objects and
monsters.  Length of the line increases with player level.

spell.name: Trance
desc: Holds every adjacent, non-resistant monster for a level-dependent
number of turns; animals are entranced for longer.

spell.name: Mass Sleep
desc: Attempts to put to sleep each monster within line of sight.
Monsters that resist sleep are not affected.

spell.name: Become Pukel-man
desc: Gives you the form of a statue of the Drúedain, slow but hard to hurt.

spell.name: Eagle's Flight
desc: Gives you the form of one of the great eagles of Manwë.

spell.name: Bear Form
desc: Allows you to take the form of a great bear of the mountains, sweeping
aside your enemies with your mighty paws.

spell.name: Tremor
desc: Causes a targeted 4-square radius earthquake.
Earthquakes may hurt the player, damage monsters and destroy items
in some squares in the area of effect.
Artifacts will not be destroyed by this spell.
This spell has no effect when used in the town.

spell.name: Haste Self
desc: Hastes you (+10 to speed) for a level-dependent duration.

spell.name: Revitalize
desc: Restores all stats and experience points to maximum.

spell.name: Rapid Regeneration
desc: Speed up digestion to increase regeneration of hitpoints for
the next 5+1d3 turns (or until hungry).

spell.name: Herbal Curing
desc: Cures all cuts, poison, stunning and black breath, and leaves you
well-nourished.

spell.name: Meteor Swarm
desc: Shoots a swarm of 3 or 4 meteors.
Meteors will travel until hitting a wall, a monster,
or reaching the target location.
Meteors will explode as a radius-1 ball that does unresistable
damage to each monster in its area of effect.
If this kills the monster that blocked the path to the target
location, the next meteor may continue to find another target.

spell.name: Rift
desc: Fires a gravity beam that hurts each monster in its path
and has a chance of teleporting it away.

spell.name: Ice Storm
desc: Strikes every monster in line of sight with sheets of ice from above.

spell.name: Volcanic Eruption
desc: Creates a radius 5 ball of fire, followed by a radius 5 earthquake,
around the player.

spell.name: River of Lightning
desc: Spews plasma in a long narrow cone from the player.

spell.name: Call Light
desc: Lights up all squares in a level-dependent area, and hurts
all light-sensitive monsters in the area of effect.
If you are in a room, the entire room will be lit up as well.

spell.name: Detect Evil
desc: Detects all evil monsters in the immediate area,
for one turn only.

spell.name: Minor Healing
desc: Heals a level-dependent amount or percentage of hitpoints, and
cures 20 points worth of cuts and of stunning.

spell.name: Bless
desc: Blesses you, giving a bonus of +5 to AC and +10 to-hit, for a
level-dependent number of turns.

spell.name: Sense Invisible
desc: Enables you to see invisible monsters for 24+1d24 turns.

spell.name: Heroism
desc: Cures 10 points of damage, removes fear and, from character level 20,
grants you heroism (resistance to fear, and a bonus of +12 to-hit)
for a level-dependent duration.

spell.name: Orb of Draining
desc: Shoots a radius-2 or radius-3 ball that does unresistable
damage to each monster in its area of effect.
Evil monsters take double damage.
The bigger area of effect is attained at character level 30.

spell.name: Spear of Light
desc: Fires a beam that lights up each square and hurts each
light-sensitive monster in its path.

spell.name: Dispel Undead
desc: Inflicts unresistable damage on each undead monster within line of sight.

spell.name: Dispel Evil
desc: Inflicts unresistable damage on each evil monster within line of sight.

spell.name: Protection from Evil
desc: Protects you from evil for a level-dependent duration:
all melee attacks by evil monsters have a chance to be repelled,
unless the monster's level is higher than your character level.

spell.name: Remove Curse
desc: Attempts to remove a curse from an item, more effective at higher
character levels.

spell.name: Portal
desc: Teleports you randomly over a short distance.

spell.name: Remembrance
desc: Restores experience points to maximum if it is currently below maximum.

spell.name: Word of Recall
desc: Teleports you from the dungeon to the town or from the town to the
deepest level you have visited in the dungeon.
The recall effect is not immediate; it is delayed by 14+1d20 turns.
During that delay, the prayer can be canceled by invoking the prayer
of recall again.
This prayer has no effect when the option to restrict the use of
stairs and recall is set, unless Morgoth is dead.

spell.name: Healing
desc: Heals 2000 points of damage and cures all stunning, cuts, poison
and amnesia.

spell.name: Restoration
desc: Restores to maximum all stats that are currently below maximum.

spell.name: Clairvoyance
desc: Lights up, maps out, and senses all objects on the complete current
dungeon level.

spell.name: Enchant Weapon
desc: Attempts to improve the to-hit bonus and the to-dam bonus of a weapon.

spell.name: Enchant Armour
desc: Attempts to improve the armour class bonus of a piece of armour.

spell.name: Smite Evil
desc: Temporarily makes your melee attacks slay evil creatures.

spell.name: Glyph of Warding
desc: Inscribes a glyph of warding beneath you.
Summoned monsters can't appear on the glyph.
If a monster attempts to move onto the glyph or melee you while you
are standing on the glyph, it must first succeed in breaking the glyph.
Higher level monsters are more likely to break the glyph.
The glyph will remain where it is, until a monster succeeds in
breaking it, or until you leave the level.

spell.name: Demon Bane
desc: Temporarily makes your melee attacks powerfully slay demons.

spell.name: Banish Evil
desc: Teleports away each evil monster within line of sight.

spell.name: Word of Destruction
desc: Destroys everything in a 15-square radius circle around you.
All monsters, objects, and terrain features in the area of
effect are destroyed, except stairs and permanent walls.
You will also be blinded for 10+1d10 turns, unless you
have resistance to blindness or light.
This prayer has no effect when used in the town.

spell.name: Holy Word
desc: Inflicts unresistable damage on each evil monster within line of sight,
cures 1000 points of damage, cures all stunning, heals all cut damage,
neutralizes poison, and removes fear.

spell.name: Spear of Oromë
desc: Fires a beam of holy magic that does extra damage to evil creatures.

spell.name: Light of Manwë
desc: Casts a radius 4 ball of strong light, and then bathes the entire area
in light doing 100 damage to every light-sensitive creature.

spell.name: Nether Bolt
desc: Fires a bolt of nether magic.

spell.name: Sense Invisible
desc: Enables you to see invisible monsters for 24+1d24 turns.

spell.name: Create Darkness
desc: Darkens all squares in a level-dependent area.  If you are in a room,
the entire room will be darkened as well.

spell.name: Bat Form
desc: Changes you into the shape of a bat, weak but with excellent senses.
While shapechanged you cannot use items.

spell.name: Read Minds
desc: Detects all monsters which have a spirit in the immediate area,
and then maps in a region around them, increasing in size with
character level.

spell.name: Tap Unlife
desc: Targets the nearest undead monster and damages it to gain player mana.

spell.name: Crush
desc: Instantly kill any monster in line-of-sight with less than four times the
player's level in hitpoints, also hurting the player.  Other monsters are
unharmed.

spell.name: Sleep Evil
desc: Attempts to put to sleep each evil monster within line of sight.
Monsters that resist confusion are not affected.

spell.name: Shadow Shift
desc: Displaces your spirit a short distance, hurting your body as it is
dragged along.

spell.name: Disenchant
desc: Casts a bolt which wounds, and makes spellcasting monsters less successful
in casting spells.

spell.name: Frighten
desc: Attempts to scare a single monster for a level-dependent duration.
Monsters that resist fear are not affected.

spell.name: Vampire Strike
desc: Teleports you to the nearest living monster and drains its hitpoints
to heal and nourish you.  The number of hitpoints drained is twice your
level or one more than the monster's current hitpoints, whichever is
smaller.

spell.name: Dispel Life
desc: Inflicts unresistable damage on each living monster within line of sight.

spell.name: Dark Spear
desc: Fires a beam of darkness.

spell.name: Warg Form
desc: Changes you into the form of a warg, and gives you temporary berserk
strength, at the cost of some hitpoints.

spell.name: Banish Spirits
desc: Teleports away each monster with a spirit within line of sight.

spell.name: Annihilate
desc: Inflicts damage equal to four times player level on a single monster that
is not undead, an elemental, a golem, or a vortex.

spell.name: Grond's Blow
desc: Destroys everything in a 15-square radius circle around you.
All monsters, objects, and terrain features in the area of
effect are destroyed, except stairs and permanent walls.
You will also be blinded for 10+1d10 turns, unless you
have resistance to blindness or dark.
This ritual has no effect when used in the town.

spell.name: Unleash Chaos
desc: Fires a chaos beam, arc or ball in the chosen direction, wakes everything
in the area, and attempts to frighten everything in line of sight.

spell.name: Fume of Mordor
desc: Darkens, maps out, and detects all objects on the complete current
dungeon level.

spell.name: Storm of Darkness
desc: Invokes a radius-4 darkness ball.

spell.name: Power Sacrifice
desc: Exchanges 50 hitpoints for 50 mana.

spell.name: Zone of Unmagic
desc: Produces a zone of disenchantment affecting the player and monsters
within radius 4.

spell.name: Vampire Form
desc: Allows you to assume the form of a vampire at the cost of half your
current hitpoints, than teleports you to the nearest living monster
and drains a level-dependent number of hitpoints, healing and nourishing
you.  When first transformed you will temporarily be able
to take hitpoints from living monsters with your bite attack.

spell.name: Curse
desc: Deals direct damage to a single monster, more the more damaged the monster
is already, at the cost of 100 hitpoints.

spell.name: Command
desc: Allows you to take control of a monster, and move it instead of yourself.
Possible actions are move, stand still, 'd'rop, 'm'agic, or 'r'elease.

spell.name: Bless
desc: Blesses you, giving a bonus of +5 to AC and +10 to-hit, for a
level-dependent number of turns.

spell.name: Detect Evil
desc: Detects all evil monsters in the immediate area,
for one turn only.

spell.name: Call Light
desc: Lights up all squares in a level-dependent area, and hurts
all light-sensitive monsters in the area of effect.
If you are in a room, the entire room will be lit up as well.

spell.name: Minor Healing
desc: Heals a level-dependent amount or percentage of hitpoints, and
cures 20 points worth of cuts and of stunning.

spell.name: Sense Invisible
desc: Enables you to see invisible monsters for 24+1d24 turns.

spell.name: Heroism
desc: Cures 10 points of damage, removes fear and, from character level 15,
grants you heroism (resistance to fear, and a bonus of +12 to-hit)
for a level-dependent duration.

spell.name: Protection from Evil
desc: Protects you from evil for a level-dependent duration:
all melee attacks by evil monsters have a chance to be repelled,
unless the monster's level is higher than your character level.

spell.name: Remove Curse
desc: Attempts to remove a curse from an item, more effective at higher
character levels.

spell.name: Word of Recall
desc: Teleports you from the dungeon to the town or from the town to the
deepest level you have visited in the dungeon.
The recall effect is not immediate; it is delayed by 14+1d20 turns.
During that delay, the prayer can be canceled by invoking the prayer
of recall again.
This prayer has no effect when the option to restrict the use of
stairs and recall is set, unless Morgoth is dead.

spell.name: Healing
desc: Heals 2000 points of damage and cures all stunning, cuts, poison
and amnesia.

spell.name: Clairvoyance
desc: Lights up, maps out, and senses all objects on the complete current
dungeon level.

spell.name: Smite Evil
desc: Temporarily makes your melee attacks slay evil creatures.

spell.name: Demon Bane
desc: Temporarily makes your melee attacks powerfully slay demons.

spell.name: Enchant Weapon
desc: Attempts to improve the to-hit bonus and the to-dam bonus of a weapon.

spell.name: Enchant Armour
desc: Attempts to improve the armour class bonus of a piece of armour.

spell.name: Single Combat
desc: Encases you and the targeted monster in a stone cell from which only the
winner can emerge.

spell.name: Detect Monsters
desc: Detects all non-invisible monsters in the immediate area,
for one turn only.

spell.name: Phase Door
desc: Teleports you randomly up to 10 squares away.

spell.name: Object Detection
desc: Detects all objects in the immediate area.

spell.name: Detect Stairs
desc: Detects all stairs in a wide area.

spell.name: Recharging
desc: Adds charges to a stack of wands or staves.
Chance of success and number of charges gained increase with your
level and decrease with level of wand or staff and number of charges.
A failed attempt to recharge destroys one wand or staff from the stack.

spell.name: Reveal Monsters
desc: Detects all monsters in the immediate area, for one turn only.

spell.name: Teleport Self
desc: Teleports you randomly within the current level.

spell.name: Hit and Run
desc: Prepares you to teleport a short distance after stealing from a monster.

spell.name: Teleport Other
desc: Produces a bolt that teleports away the first monster in its path.
Distance teleported increases with player level.

spell.name: Teleport Level
desc: Teleports you 1 level up or 1 level down (chosen at random).
This spell may have no effect when the forced descent option is set.

spell.name: Remove Hunger
desc: Magically renders you comfortably fed (but not satiated).

spell.name: Detect Life
desc: Detects all living monsters in the immediate area, for one turn only.

spell.name: Herbal Curing
desc: Cures all cuts, poison, stunning and black breath.

spell.name: Resist Poison
desc: Grants you resistance to poison for 20+1d20 turns.

spell.name: Turn Stone to Mud
desc: Produces a beam that destroys the first section of wall it hits,
unless it is a permanent wall.  Each monster caught in the beam that
is susceptible to rock remover takes 20+1d30 points of damage.

spell.name: Sense Surroundings
desc: Maps the nearby area.

spell.name: Cover Tracks
desc: Prevents you from leaving scent for monsters to track you by for a
level-dependent duration.

spell.name: Create Arrows
desc: Allows the player to turn a staff into a stack of arrows, with quality
depending on staff level and player level.

spell.name: Haste Self
desc: Hastes you (+10 to speed) for a level-dependent duration.

spell.name: Decoy
desc: Leaves a magical decoy that looks and sounds like the player.

spell.name: Brand Ammunition
desc: Brands one stack of ammunition with fire, cold, or poison
(selected at random) and at the same time attempts to improve
the to-hit bonus and the to-dam bonus of the same ammunition.
The spell has no effect if the ammunition is already branded, has a
slay, is broken, or is cursed.

spell.name: Seek Battle
desc: Detects all monsters susceptible to fear in the immediate area,
for one turn only.

spell.name: Berserk Strength
desc: Removes fear and grants you berserk strength (resistance to fear,
+75 melee skill, -10 to AC, and prevents healing
over time) for a level-dependent duration.

spell.name: Whirlwind Attack
desc: Deals a level-dependent number of melee blows to each adjacent enemy.
At level 5 you do one blow and gain an additional blow every 15
levels (2 at 20, 3 at 35, and 4 at 50).

spell.name: Shatter Stone
desc: Destroys an adjacent section of wall or rubble, unless it is a permanent
wall.  Deals 20+1d30 damage to monsters vulnerable to rock remover.

spell.name: Leap into Battle
desc: You run up to 4 spaces towards targeted enemy, then perform a
melee blow.  You gain an additional blow at levels 25 and 40.  If you
moved, the number of blows is reduced by 25% for each space, then rounded.

spell.name: Grim Purpose
desc: Your mind becomes too focused to be slowed, paralyzed or confused
for 12+d12 turns.

spell.name: Maim Foe
desc: Attempts a level-dependent number of melee blows against the targeted
enemy.  You get 1 blow for every 15 levels.  If any of these blows
damage the enemy, it will be stunned for 6 turns.

spell.name: Howl of the Damned
desc: Attempts to scare every monster in line of sight for a duration dependent
on player level and monster depth.  Monsters that resist fear are not
affected.

spell.name: Relentless Taunting
desc: Makes any monster that can move more inclined to run toward you, and less
likely to use a ranged attack (including spells and innate abilities).

spell.name: Venom
desc: Coats all your melee weapons with poison for 18+d18 turns.

spell.name: Werewolf Form
desc: With a blood-curdling cry you change into a half-man half-wolf!
In this form you move, attack, and heal faster.

spell.name: Bloodlust
desc: Gives you a powerful desire to kill, increased every time you satisfy it.
Gives you extra melee damage and extra blows, but comes
with dangerous side-effects.

spell.name: Unholy Reprieve
desc: Restores STR, INT, CON, and experience at the cost of 66 HP.

spell.name: Forceful Blow
desc: Attempts a melee blow that deals additional force damage when it hits,
knocking the target back with a chance to stun it.

spell.name: Quake
desc: Causes a radius 13 earthquake centered around the player.
